techniques.name: Vertical Acceleration Gait Authentication
techniques.description: Authentication technique that uses the vertical acceleration of the user's foot during the swing phase of the gait cycle as a biometric identifier.
sources: @inproceedings{teradaPerformanceGaitAuthentication2011,  title = {Performance of Gait Authentication Using an Acceleration Sensor},  booktitle = {2011 34th {{International Conference}} on {{Telecommunications}} and {{Signal Processing}} ({{TSP}})},  author = {Terada, Shuhei and Enomoto, Yusuke and Hanawa, Dai and Oguchi, Kimio},  year = {2011},  month = aug,  pages = {34--36},  doi = {10.1109/TSP.2011.6043780}}
